list.title: API Keys
list.description: API keys can access Scivra API endpoints available to your account. Keep them private, rotate them if exposed, and revoke keys you no longer use.
list.empty_message: No API keys yet. Create one when you are ready to connect Scivra from your own tools.

add.title: Create API Key
add.description: Name this key so you can recognize it later. Store it safely, never share it in public code, and revoke it immediately if it is exposed. Usage is subject to your account limits and platform rate limits.
